inspected_urls.label: EXACT
inspected_urls.note: 101 URLs inspected via GSC URL Inspection API with 0 errors. Confirmed by full-url-inspection-results.json.

indexed_pages.corrected: SAMPLE_BASED — 20/101 inspected were indexed. Extrapolating to 649 gives ~129. This is an ESTIMATE, not a count.
indexed_pages.resolution: We cannot claim '20% indexed' as fact. We can say: 'In a 101-URL sample, 19.8% were indexed. GSC UI reports 238 total indexed pages.'

discovered_not_indexed.corrected: SAMPLE_BASED — 54/101 inspected were discovered-not-indexed. Extrapolation only.

unknown_to_google.corrected: SAMPLE_BASED — 26/101 inspected were unknown. Extrapolation only.

duplicate_canonical.corrected: SAMPLE_BASED — 1/101 inspected had duplicate canonical issue. Only one confirmed case.

domain_age_claim.verification_needed: NEEDS_VERIFICATION — not independently verified. Based on creation date in Google OAuth client (May 19, 2026) which may not reflect actual domain registration date.
domain_age_claim.label: UNVERIFIED

domain_authority_ceiling.original_claim: Domain authority is the single biggest blocker
domain_authority_ceiling.corrected: INFERRED — supported by (a) SERP competitor analysis showing DR 70-100 competitors, (b) all 38 T1 queries ranking at positions 71-99, (c) 0 backlinks confirmed. However, this is a correlation, not a controlled experiment. Other factors (content quality, site structure, crawl budget) may also contribute.
domain_authority_ceiling.label: INFERRED_WITH_STRONG_EVIDENCE

gsc_impressions.label: EXACT
gsc_impressions.source: GSC Search Analytics API, page dimension, rowLimit=250, 2026-05-31 to 2026-06-07

measurement_taxonomy.EXACT: Verified count from API or file — no estimation.
measurement_taxonomy.ESTIMATED: Extrapolated from sample or corrected via factor. Should be flagged.
measurement_taxonomy.SAMPLE_BASED: Based on partial inspection (101/649). Cannot be claimed as site-wide fact.
measurement_taxonomy.UNVERIFIED: Claim not independently verified. Needs additional check.
measurement_taxonomy.INFERRED_WITH_STRONG_EVIDENCE: Supported by multiple data points but not experimentally proven.
measurement_taxonomy.NEEDS_FULL_INSPECTION: Requires completing the full 649 URL inspection to become EXACT.
